description: You are a labor economist analyzing wage survey data. Before building wage regression models, you need to assess the dimensionality of worker characteristics using Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_data/wage_survey.gdt (containing variables wage, educ, exper, age, hrswk, and tenure), write and execute a Gretl hansl script that performs PCA on all six variables and retains the component scores. Save the PCA text output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/pca_results.txt, the augmented dataset with scores to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/wage_survey_pca.gdt, and the script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/pca_analysis.inp.
